heading: API Documentation
body:
To learn more about assembling an aggregation pipeline, see [Aggregation
Pipeline](manual/core/aggregation-pipeline) in the MongoDB Server manual.

For more information about the methods and classes used on this page, see the
following API documentation:

- [Collection](https://mongodb.github.io/node-mongodb-native/7.1/classes/Collection.html)

- [aggregate()](https://mongodb.github.io/node-mongodb-native/7.1/classes/Collection.html#aggregate)

- [watch()](https://mongodb.github.io/node-mongodb-native/7.1/classes/Collection.html#watch)

- [AggregateOptions](https://mongodb.github.io/node-mongodb-native/7.1/interfaces/AggregateOptions.html)
